## JANE_DOE

jane@placeholder.invalid | portfolio.placeholder.invalid | San Francisco, CA

---

### SOME_COMPANY — Senior Product Designer (Checkout & Conversion)
*2021 – Present*

Owned the end-to-end design for 3 revenue-critical checkout flows serving 1.8M monthly active users.

- Owned the checkout redesign from discovery to launch: 3 rounds of Figma prototype testing with 26 participants across 2 user segments identified 2 high-impact friction points the original spec had missed; post-launch cart abandonment dropped by 16% and average checkout time fell from 4.1 minutes to 2.6 minutes.
- Redesigned the guest-checkout entry point based on synthesis from 14 moderated usability sessions; activation rate (reaching the payment confirmation screen) rose from 52% to 68% within 8 weeks of launch.
- Contributed 32 production-ready Figma components to the company's core design system (tokens, variants, interactive states, dark-mode support), each with matching Storybook documentation; designer-to-engineer redline clarification cycles fell from ~5 per component to under 1.
- Validated a streamlined address-entry flow using Maze unmoderated tests across 120 participants; error rate on the address step dropped from 18% to 7%, preventing ~4k support contacts per month based on pre-launch estimation.

### BLUE_LABS — Product Designer
*2018 – 2021*

- Shipped the onboarding redesign for the B2B dashboard product after conducting 10 JTBD interviews with new customers; 30-day feature adoption for the top-3 core actions rose from 31% to 49% within one quarter of launch.
- Established the design critique cadence for a 4-person design team: weekly structured critique with a decision log, reducing the number of late-stage design reversals from ~3/quarter to 0 over 12 months.

Figma · FigJam · Storybook · Maze · UserTesting · Amplitude · Protopie · WCAG 2.1 AA · Design tokens · Usability testing
